description_en: The parsed text for سورة البقرة / ورؤوس الآي preserves heads 1–142, then an unnumbered head before 255, and then 255–285; the stretch 143–253 is absent from the text witness used here.
impact_en: Full ruʾūs al-āy extraction for al-Baqara must remain partial unless resolved from an image witness or another reliable text witness.

description_en: Several double entries are compressed onto one line (119/120 and 256/257), one line breaks the numeral for 136 across a page boundary, and 277 is misread as 577.
impact_en: These items can be normalized with context, but each correction must be marked as editorially restored from sequence.

description_en: The table of contents surfaces nazāʾir headings only through بصري, but the body of the بصري section also contains a subheading for ذكر نظائر الشامي rather than a separate indexed section.
impact_en: Nazāʾir extraction needs a second segmentation layer inside the basri section to isolate the Shami material.
